problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
